text.title: Segment-Aware Design System Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Segment-Aware Design System output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: segments populated with a typed value
state_taxonomy populated with a typed value
token_extensions populated with a typed value
cta_policy populated with a typed value
trial_policy populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
